answers: Problem solving steps: define problem clearly → gather info → generate solutions → evaluate → implement → review.
Techniques: root cause analysis (5 Whys), brainstorming, mind mapping, SWOT analysis, and reverse thinking.
Tips: break big problems into smaller ones, look at it from different angles, take breaks, and learn from failures.
Somossa somadhan: prothome somossa ta bujho, tarpor options khojho, best solution choose koro, ar implement koro.
